items.fullDesc: Fifty nights and counting. Join us for a very special evening celebrating six years of Sleepover Club — 50 events, 120+ artists, and countless unforgettable nights across Ireland and the UK. Expect a handpicked lineup of some of our all-time favourite acts alongside a few surprises. This one is for the community that made it all possible.
items.shortDesc: Fifty nights and counting. Join us to celebrate six years of Sleepover Club with a handpicked lineup of our favourite artists.
items.title: Sound of Spring | Gais Guevara | Walshy | Pippa Molony

items.fullDesc: A sold-out night at Whelan's, Dublin. Another incredible chapter in the Sleepover Club story — packed room, incredible energy, and artists who gave everything.
items.shortDesc: A sold-out night at Whelan's with some of Dublin's finest emerging talent.
items.title: Sleepover Club Vol. 49

items.fullDesc: Taking the Sleepover Club experience to London for another intimate night at The Lexington. Irish and UK artists sharing a stage for a crowd that came ready.
items.shortDesc: Taking the Sleepover Club experience to London — an intimate night at The Lexington.
items.subtitle: London Edition
items.title: Sleepover Club Vol. 48

items.fullDesc: A late-night affair at The Grand Social, Dublin. Dark rooms, loud music, and the best crowd in Dublin. Everything a Sleepover Club night should be.
items.shortDesc: A late-night affair at The Grand Social — dark rooms, loud music, and the best crowd in Dublin.
items.title: Sleepover Club Vol. 47

items.fullDesc: Sleepover Club returns to the West for a night of incredible music at the legendary Roisín Dubh in Galway. A crowd that matched the energy of the artists every step of the way.
items.shortDesc: Sleepover Club returns to the West — a night of incredible music at the legendary Roisín Dubh.
items.subtitle: Galway Edition
items.title: Sleepover Club Vol. 46

items.fullDesc: A massive night at The Limelight in Belfast. Sleepover Club brings its signature energy North, with a lineup that bridged Ireland's thriving indie scenes.
items.shortDesc: A massive night at The Limelight — Sleepover Club brings the party to Belfast.
items.subtitle: Belfast Edition
items.title: Sleepover Club Vol. 45
